name: @umbraculum/media
description: Shared media assets framework for web and native apps (manifest generator + asset loader). Platform package ships an empty manifest; vertical asset bundles (e.g. @umbraculum/brewery-media-assets) own PNG content.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && tsup src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
